title: Gold Ontology for Generic Procurement Contract MVP
description: Gold ontology based only on the generic_procurement_contract_mvp input dataset. This file is a reference ontology, not a gold evidence map or scoring script.
design_principles: Use business concepts only; exclude technical Controller, Service, DTO, Mapper, repository, package and framework concepts.
Include only concepts with support in source code, DDL, CSV, or business documents.
Represent synonyms inside each concept as aliases, not as separate concepts.
Keep evidence_refs as lightweight source placeholders; do not create a separate evidence map in this round.
Classify required core concepts and optional enrichment concepts for evaluator use.

concepts.name: PurchaseRequest
concepts.description: Business request for goods or services before sourcing, contracting, ordering, receiving, invoicing, and payment.

attributes.name: request_id
attributes.description: Stable identifier of the purchase request.

attributes.name: request_title
attributes.description: Short business title of the request.

attributes.name: requester_user_id
attributes.description: Employee who created or owns the request.

attributes.name: preferred_supplier_id
attributes.description: Preferred supplier, if known before award.

attributes.name: estimated_amount
attributes.description: Estimated total amount for approval routing.

relations.name: has item
relations.description: A request contains one or more request lines.

relations.name: requested by
relations.description: A request is created by an employee.

relations.name: belongs to
relations.description: A request belongs to a department.

relations.name: prefers
relations.description: A request can identify a preferred supplier.

relations.name: has approval task
relations.description: A request can have approval records.

relations.name: results in
relations.description: Approved requests can lead to contracts.

relations.name: results in
relations.description: A request can lead to purchase orders.

concepts.name: PurchaseRequestItem
concepts.description: Line-level item or service requested under a purchase request.

attributes.name: item_description
attributes.description: Description of the requested material or service.

relations.name: belongs to
relations.description: Each line belongs to one purchase request.

relations.name: describes
relations.description: Line item text and category describe a material or service need.

concepts.name: ApprovalTask
concepts.description: Workflow decision record for purchase request, contract, or payment approval.

relations.name: approves
relations.description: Approval tasks can target purchase requests.

relations.name: approves
relations.description: Approval tasks can target payment requests.

relations.name: performed by
relations.description: Approval decision is performed by an employee.

concepts.name: Supplier
concepts.description: External organization that provides goods or services to the company.

relations.name: preferred by
relations.description: Supplier can be preferred by requests.

relations.name: party to
relations.description: Supplier is party to contracts.

relations.name: receives
relations.description: Supplier receives purchase orders.

relations.name: issues
relations.description: Supplier issues invoices.

concepts.name: Contract
concepts.description: Legal agreement between the company and a supplier, normally created from an approved purchase request.

relations.name: created from
relations.description: Contract references an approved purchase request.

relations.name: with
relations.description: Contract is with one supplier.

relations.name: reviewed by
relations.description: Legal reviewer is an employee.

relations.name: enables
relations.description: Active contracts enable purchase order release.

concepts.name: PurchaseOrder
concepts.description: Operational order released against an active contract and purchase request.

relations.name: released against
relations.description: PO is released against a contract.

relations.name: for
relations.description: PO traces back to a purchase request.

relations.name: sent to
relations.description: PO is sent to supplier.

relations.name: has receipt
relations.description: PO can have goods receipts.

relations.name: has invoice
relations.description: PO can have supplier invoices.

concepts.name: GoodsReceipt
concepts.description: Receiving record created by warehouse when goods or services are delivered.

relations.name: for
relations.description: Receipt is recorded against a purchase order.

relations.name: recorded by
relations.description: Receipt is recorded by a warehouse employee.

relations.name: supports
relations.description: Receipt can support invoice matching.

concepts.name: Invoice
concepts.description: Supplier billing document matched against purchase order and goods receipt before payment.

attributes.name: receipt_id
attributes.description: Related receipt, if matched to receipt.

relations.name: issued by
relations.description: Invoice is issued by supplier.

relations.name: for
relations.description: Invoice references a purchase order.

relations.name: matched to
relations.description: Invoice may match against goods receipt.

relations.name: generates
relations.description: Matched invoices can generate payment requests.

concepts.name: Payment
concepts.description: Finance request and execution record for paying a matched supplier invoice.

relations.name: for
relations.description: Payment request is for one invoice.

relations.name: approved by
relations.description: Payment approval is performed by finance employee.

relations.name: has approval task
relations.description: Payment can have approval records.

concepts.name: Department
concepts.description: Organizational unit that owns purchase requests and users.

relations.name: has employee
relations.description: Department contains employees.

relations.name: owns
relations.description: Department owns purchase requests.

concepts.name: Employee
concepts.description: Internal user or employee who performs procurement, approval, receipt, invoice, legal, or payment actions.

relations.name: belongs to
relations.description: Employee belongs to a department.

relations.name: creates
relations.description: Employee can create purchase requests.

relations.name: performs
relations.description: Employee can perform approval tasks.

relations.name: records
relations.description: Warehouse employee records goods receipt.

relations.name: approves
relations.description: Finance employee approves payment.

concepts.name: Material
concepts.description: Requested good or service described by purchase request line item description and category. The input dataset does not contain a standalone material master table.

attributes.name: item_description
attributes.description: Text description from purchase request line.

relations.name: requested on
relations.description: Material or service need appears on request line items.

relations.name: has item
relations.description: A request contains one or more request lines.

relations.name: requested by
relations.description: A request is created by an employee.

relations.name: belongs to
relations.description: A request belongs to a department.

relations.name: prefers
relations.description: A request can identify a preferred supplier.

relations.name: has approval task
relations.description: A request can have approval records.

relations.name: results in
relations.description: Approved requests can lead to contracts.

relations.name: results in
relations.description: A request can lead to purchase orders.

relations.name: belongs to
relations.description: Each line belongs to one purchase request.

relations.name: describes
relations.description: Line item text and category describe a material or service need.

relations.name: approves
relations.description: Approval tasks can target purchase requests.

relations.name: approves
relations.description: Approval tasks can target payment requests.

relations.name: performed by
relations.description: Approval decision is performed by an employee.

relations.name: preferred by
relations.description: Supplier can be preferred by requests.

relations.name: party to
relations.description: Supplier is party to contracts.

relations.name: receives
relations.description: Supplier receives purchase orders.

relations.name: issues
relations.description: Supplier issues invoices.

relations.name: created from
relations.description: Contract references an approved purchase request.

relations.name: with
relations.description: Contract is with one supplier.

relations.name: reviewed by
relations.description: Legal reviewer is an employee.

relations.name: enables
relations.description: Active contracts enable purchase order release.

relations.name: released against
relations.description: PO is released against a contract.

relations.name: for
relations.description: PO traces back to a purchase request.

relations.name: sent to
relations.description: PO is sent to supplier.

relations.name: has receipt
relations.description: PO can have goods receipts.

relations.name: has invoice
relations.description: PO can have supplier invoices.

relations.name: for
relations.description: Receipt is recorded against a purchase order.

relations.name: recorded by
relations.description: Receipt is recorded by a warehouse employee.

relations.name: supports
relations.description: Receipt can support invoice matching.

relations.name: issued by
relations.description: Invoice is issued by supplier.

relations.name: for
relations.description: Invoice references a purchase order.

relations.name: matched to
relations.description: Invoice may match against goods receipt.

relations.name: generates
relations.description: Matched invoices can generate payment requests.

relations.name: for
relations.description: Payment request is for one invoice.

relations.name: approved by
relations.description: Payment approval is performed by finance employee.

relations.name: has approval task
relations.description: Payment can have approval records.

relations.name: has employee
relations.description: Department contains employees.

relations.name: owns
relations.description: Department owns purchase requests.

relations.name: belongs to
relations.description: Employee belongs to a department.

relations.name: creates
relations.description: Employee can create purchase requests.

relations.name: performs
relations.description: Employee can perform approval tasks.

relations.name: records
relations.description: Warehouse employee records goods receipt.

relations.name: approves
relations.description: Finance employee approves payment.

relations.name: requested on
relations.description: Material or service need appears on request line items.

states.name: REJECTED
states.description: Rejected request that may be revised.

rules.name: Purchase Request Requires Line
rules.effect: request must contain at least one line item

rules.name: High Value Request Finance Approval
rules.condition: estimated amount reaches high value threshold
rules.effect: finance manager approval is required after department approval

rules.name: Rejection Requires Comment
rules.effect: approval comment must explain the rejection reason

rules.name: Supplier Must Be Active
rules.condition: before supplier award or new contract

rules.name: High Risk Supplier Not Awarded
rules.effect: supplier should not receive a new active contract

rules.name: Invoice Variance Tolerance
rules.effect: invoice amount variance must be within allowed tolerance or become exception

rules.name: Payment Requires Finance Approval
rules.effect: finance manager or admin approval is required

roles.name: Department Manager
roles.description: Approves normal purchase requests for their department.

roles.name: Procurement Specialist
roles.description: Reviews supplier, prepares contracts, releases purchase orders.

roles.name: AP Clerk
roles.description: Matches invoices and creates payment requests.

roles.name: Procurement Admin
roles.description: Maintains master data and can override workflow issues.
